title: taraxacum oreophilum
intro: Taraxacum oreophilum, also known as mountain dandelion, is a perennial plant species within the Taraxacum genus, sharing similarities with the common dandelion. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum oreophilum lie in its leaves, roots, and flowers, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of consuming Taraxacum oreophilum include supporting digestive health, acting as a diuretic, and potentially reducing blood sugar levels. Taraxacum oreophilum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
